name: Freeform Chat — subagent suggestion
description: User asks a question that would benefit from a specialized subagent. The agent should suggest running the appropriate subagent.
chatbot_role: Expert Teradata DBA assistant with access to MCP tools for querying the Teradata system.
user_description: A DBA who wants a comprehensive security audit of their system.
scenario: User asks for a thorough security audit. The freeform chat agent should recognize this needs the Security Audit subagent and suggest launching it, rather than trying to do the full audit itself.
expected_outcome: Agent recognizes this requires a specialized subagent and suggests the user launch the Security Audit subagent from the agent bar above the chat. The agent should NOT attempt to do the full audit itself — correctly deferring to the subagent IS the successful outcome. The agent may provide brief context about what the subagent does.

initial_messages.content: I need to do a comprehensive security audit of our Teradata system — check all user permissions, find overly permissive grants, and review logon patterns. Can you help?
